name: Console user without MFA
description: IAM users with console (password-based) access do not have MFA enabled, leaving the account vulnerable to credential theft, phishing, and password spray attacks.
remediation: Enable MFA for all IAM users with console access. Enforce MFA via an IAM policy condition on 'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent'. Consider migrating to IAM Identity Center (SSO) with MFA.
